values.content:
=You are a JSON generator. You only output raw JSON. Nothing else. Ever.

Read the input message and output this JSON format:
{"subject": "...", "body": "..."}

Rules:
- Subject: max 10 words
- Body: 80-120 words by default
- "short" in message → 40-60 words body
- "detailed" or "long" in message → 150-200 words body
- "formal" → formal tone
- "casual" → casual/friendly tone
- "urgent" → urgent tone
- "friendly" → warm friendly tone
- "in Hindi" → write in Hindi
- "in French" → write in French
- "in Spanish" → write in Spanish
- "CTA: x" → end body with that exact CTA phrase
- "follow up" → write as a follow-up to previous conversation
- "cold email" → write as first-touch cold outreach
- "reminder" → write as a gentle reminder
- "promo" or "offer" or "discount" → promotional style
- "apology" or "sorry" → sincere apology style
- "announcement" or "launch" → exciting announcement style
- "emoji subject" → add relevant emojis in subject line

STRICT RULES:
- Output ONLY the JSON object
- No explanation, no greeting, no markdown, no backticks
- Maintain the exact meaning of the original message
- Never add information that is not in the original message

Original message:
{{ $json.campaignMessage }}

parameters.text:
=📊 *Campaign Complete*

⏰ Completed: {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') }}

✅ Campaign execution finished successfully.

📋 *Available Commands*

/stats — view full campaign report

=✅ *Reset Complete*

Emails have been reset to *pending* status.
They will be included in the next `/send` campaign.

=🔄 *Resend Queued*

All failed emails reset to *pending*.
Now run `/send your message` to resend them.

=🤖 *Campaign Bot Commands*

📧 *SEND CAMPAIGN*
/send your message here

🎨 *Tone modifiers* (add to /send):
formal, casual, urgent, friendly, short, detailed, cold email, follow up, reminder, promo, in Hindi, in French

📊 *STATUS AND REPORTS*
/status — show all emails
/status email@x.com — one email
/stats — full report
/list — list all emails

🔄 *RESET*
/reset all — reset all to pending
/reset failed — reset failed only
/reset email@x.com — reset one email
/resendfailed — queue failed to resend

➕ *MANAGE LIST*
/add email@x.com — add one email
/add email1@x.com, email2@x.com — add multiple
/remove email@x.com — remove email

🎯 *DIRECT SEND*
/sendto email@x.com: your message

❓ Send /help to see this again

=❓ Unknown command: `{{ $json.rawText }}`

Send `/help` to see all available commands.
